description: A designed ICE 'rogues-gallery' arrest card. The background is a high-contrast black-and-white close-up photograph of a person's open hand being cuffed, with metal handcuffs and a chain prominently visible, set against a dark backdrop. Large light-blue (cyan) bold serif capital text at top reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with a white sub-line beneath giving the date and location: '1/27/2025 | Newark, NJ'. On the left side, large bold white sans-serif text names the subject: 'Edgar Julca Tangoa'. Below that a white 'CRIMES:' label with a bulleted list: 'Aggravated sexual assault' and 'Child molestation'. The official DHS/ICE seal and 'ICE' wordmark appear at the lower left. A diagonal red banner ribbon across the lower-right corner reads 'NEWARK' (the field office). The composition follows ICE's standardized template branding individual arrests as trophy cards. Propaganda technique: emphasizes severe, emotionally charged crimes (sexual offenses against children) alongside the subject's name and immigration status to associate immigration enforcement with public-safety threats and justify removals. Target audience: general public and supporters of aggressive immigration enforcement.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/27/2025 | Newark, NJ; Edgar Julca Tangoa; CRIMES: Aggravated sexual assault, Child molestation; NEWARK
